Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 683}Darn, I should've checked my horoscope for today's lucky drink.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 683}Maybe I should get an apple martini...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 683}Nah, too sour. An oolong tea might be good...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 683}Wait, that's kinda boring. I'll have a Bloody Mary.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 683}Huh? You forgot my order? Oh, fine...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 683}Nah, too sour. An oolong tea might be good...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 683}Wait, that's kinda boring. I'll have a Bloody Mary.[n]{f 1 1}
